title: Better, Fresher's 3D Create Books
description: This is Addon to Better, Fresher's 3D Books.
body:
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7517cca4c8db1c7d5e823f252e828353777cda.png)
This resource pack, build on [Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books), and adds 2 new books from the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), these books contain models and textures.

It is based on the Bray & Cyber's resource pack, which includes models and textures for two enchanted books (Potato Recovery, Capacity)

**This resource pack is under development, and may contain bugs**
